calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-23-2024 Dismissal - No Appearance
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day sent forthwith from Department 206 for a request for judgment against Cross Defendant Henry Nguyen and Cross Defendant Lin Bui.

Dept. 210; Judge: Victor M. Hwang; Clerk: K. Apolonio/K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 11:22:40 a.m and concluding at 12:03 p.m. (210).

Cross Complainant Svetlana Konovich appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.
Cross Defendant Henry Nguyen and Cross Defendant Lin Bui not appearing.

Cross Complaint for Damages filed on Aug-15-2023.
Proof of service filed on Aug-15-2023.
Dismissal filed against Cross Defendants Mary Pham and Henry Wong on Sep-20-2024.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial filed Nov-29-23.

The Court finds that there is insufficient evidence to prove causes of action against Henry Nguyen and Lin Bui and therefore denies Cross Complainant the request for default judgment and the Cross complaint is dismissed without prejudice.
